column5: Xtreme Brite Brightening Gel is a potent formula designed to enhance skin clarity and radiance. Its concentrated formula effectively targets blackheads and cosmetic acne, promoting a smoother, brighter complexion.

Introducing the One Facial Sponge, the perfect daily cleanser for sensitive skin. This gentle sponge thoroughly cleanses and refreshes, removing makeup, dirt, and excess oil without irritation. It also lifts away dry, dulling skin cells, leaving your skin feeling clean, smooth, and soft. Perfect for prepping skin for moisturizers, makeup, or sunless tanning, the One Facial Sponge is available in a range of options to suit your skin type, from extra gentle to deep exfoliation. Dermatologist-tested for gentleness, this sponge is made in the USA and is the perfect choice for a healthy, radiant complexion.

Recommended by dermatologists, COMPLEX 15 Therapeutic Moisturizing Face Cream is formulated for dry, sensitive skin. Its unique system, inspired by nature, contains phospholipids, including lecithin, which naturally bind water to restore and maintain skin's moisture balance. This non-greasy formula absorbs quickly, leaving skin feeling soft and hydrated. Free from parabens, lanolin, mineral oil, and fragrance, it is hypoallergenic, non-comedogenic, and suitable for even the most sensitive skin.

Introduced in 1995, this fragrance features notes of woods, fresh citrus, and spicy leaves. Recommended for daytime use, it's important to note that individual factors such as mood, stress, age, body chemistry, diet, and medications can influence how a scent smells on the wearer. Additionally, skin type can affect fragrance longevity.

Q-tips® Cotton Swabs: The Softest, Safest Choice**Q-tips® Cotton Swabs are crafted with 100% pure cotton, boasting the most soft cotton at the tip compared to any other swab. Their firm paper stick provides gentle pressure, while a secure adhesive ensures the cotton remains firmly attached.Versatile and family-friendly, Q-tips® are ideal for various tasks, including makeup application and removal, manicure touch-ups, and newborn baby care.Unlike other brands, Q-tips® are made with 100% natural materials and are biodegradable when composted. They support recycling efforts and are the perfect choice for tasks requiring a delicate touch.With their convenient Snap Lock Opening, Q-tips® Cotton Swabs are the softest and safest option available, ensuring a gentle and effective experience.

Indulge in a flawless, shine-free complexion with our Oil Control Loose Powder. Its 100% oil-free formula absorbs excess oil, leaving you with a fresh, matte finish that endures throughout the day. Available in light and medium shades, this powder seamlessly adapts to your skin tone for a natural, radiant look.

Introducing Volum' Express, the mascara that instantly triples lash volume for all-day wear. Its patented Anti-Clump Brush ensures a clump-free, even application, while the waterproof formula keeps your lashes looking voluminous and defined all day long. Contact lens safe, Volum' Express is the perfect choice for creating a dramatic lash look that lasts.

Glycerin Soap: The Natural Choice for Healthy Skin**Glycerin soap is a gentle and effective cleanser that nourishes and protects the skin. Its humectant properties draw moisture into the skin, leaving it soft and hydrated. Unlike harsh soaps, glycerin soap maintains the skin's natural pH balance, preventing dryness and irritation.**Benefits of Clearly Natural Glycerin Products:*** 100% vegetable glycerin
* Hypoallergenic for sensitive skin
* Dermatologist recommended
* 100% natural ingredients
* Biodegradable
* Long-lasting with superior sudsing action
* Cruelty-free: no animal testing or ingredients

Aveeno Intense Relief Hand Cream is a non-greasy, fragrance-free formula that provides 24-hour protection and moisturization for dry skin. Its unique blend of emollients and Intense Relief Hand Cream helps heal dry skin and forms a protective barrier against environmental stressors. Unlike ordinary hand creams, Aveeno Intense Relief Hand Cream remains effective even after hand washing, ensuring continuous skin protection and hydration.

Experience the convenience and comfort of No Rinse Body Bath. This concentrated formula provides 16 complete baths, leaving your skin clean, refreshed, and odor-free without the need for rinsing. Its gentle formula, free from alcohol and harsh chemicals, is suitable for sensitive skin and perineal cleansing. As a liquid soap, it offers a fast and easy alternative to traditional bathing, reducing bathing time and laundry costs. Ideal for situations with limited facilities, physical limitations, or fear of bathing, No Rinse Body Bath provides a warm and comfortable bathing experience. Trusted by NASA astronauts and approved by hospitals, it guarantees 100% satisfaction. Made in the USA, it's the perfect solution for maintaining hygiene and well-being.

This rectangular travel organizer safeguards delicate items like electric shavers with its protective padding. Its three-sided zipper allows for easy access to contents. A clear plastic zippered pocket under the top flap isolates wet or leaky items, while elastic straps secure toothbrushes and small essentials. An exterior zipped pocket stores necessities like bandages and aspirin. The nylon-lined interior and durable ramie-polyester exterior are easy to clean. Measuring 10 x 7 x 3-1/2 inches, it features a sturdy webbing carry handle for convenience.

Protect your precious neckties from wrinkles and snags with this padded tie case. Its satiny lining gently cradles your ties, while the two wide elastic straps on each half keep them securely in place. The full-length zipper allows the case to open flat for effortless access. Crafted from durable ramie-polyester fabric, this case measures 17 by 6 by 1-1/4 inches and conveniently wipes clean.

Indulge in the allure of "Bora Bora Bliss," a captivating shade of pink that evokes the exotic allure of a tropical paradise. Its creamy, rich hue transforms your nails into a vibrant canvas, transporting you to the pristine shores of Bora Bora with every glance. Whether amidst the mundane of office life or the tedium of traffic, this enchanting pink will ignite a longing for sun-kissed beaches and crystal-clear waters.

Rainbow Henna, a 100% organic hair treatment, enhances all hair colors and types with shine, volume, and conditioning. Its gentle formula nourishes without scalp or skin irritation. Rainbow's Neutral (colorless) Henna coats each hair strand, enhancing natural highlights. This organic treatment blends seamlessly, fading gradually over 4-6 weeks. By smoothing and sealing the hair cuticle, Rainbow Henna imparts a lustrous shine and increased body. Its customizable recipes cater to specific hair needs, including gray coverage and texture improvement.
Ralph's vibrant essence is a captivating blend of sparkling green apple leaves, zesty orange mandarin, charismatic pink magnolia, inspiring purple freesia, and soft blue musk.

Conceal imperfections with My Spots Are Concealed, the waterproof cover stick that seamlessly blends with your skin tone. Available in three shades, this versatile product can be used alone or with a water-based foundation to effectively hide blemishes, marks, and other complexion flaws on both the face and body.

Calvin Klein's EDT Spray 1.7 oz, introduced in 1994, is a refreshing daytime fragrance. Its alluring blend of papaya, pineapple, and jasmine is complemented by green tea and amber, creating a captivating scent that evokes a sense of warmth and vitality.

Indulge in the allure of NARS Cosmetics All About Eve Eyeshadow Shades, where inspiration and desire intertwine. These captivating duos feature the same crease-resistant formula as NARS's renowned single eyeshadows, offering unparalleled longevity. Each pair harmoniously combines shades that can be worn individually or blended seamlessly. Whether applied sheer for a subtle touch or layered for a bold statement, these versatile eyeshadows empower you to create a spectrum of looks. Enhance their intensity by using them wet or dry, unlocking endless possibilities for artistic expression.
Fresh Farmacy harnesses the calming properties of chamomile extract, the soothing touch of rose and lavender for dry patches, and the blemish-clearing power of tea tree oil to rejuvenate your skin.
Frownies Facial Patches, a box containing 144 patches, are designed to reduce the appearance of expression lines and wrinkles on the forehead and between the eyes.

Visco-GEL® Toe Spacers provide comfortable separation between the big and second toes, promoting proper alignment and reducing pressure on the bunion joint. Crafted from a unique gel, these positioners absorb pressure and friction while releasing vitamin-enriched mineral oil to soothe and moisturize skin. They enhance shoe comfort and are washable and reusable for extended use.

This paraben-free moisturizer mimics the skin's natural lipids, replenishing lost lipids and strengthening the skin's barrier. Formulated with plant-derived ingredients, it protects against environmental stressors, leaving skin soft and supple. Benefits include repairing post-treatment skin, sealing in moisture, and being non-greasy and easily absorbed. Its patented technology ensures optimal results.

Indulge in the whimsical aroma of Body Fantasies Cotton Candy Fantasy, a captivating fragrance for women. This Floral Fruity Gourmand scent tantalizes with a delectable blend of cotton candy, vanilla, and sugar cane, creating a sweet and enchanting experience. The fruity notes of strawberry and raspberry add a vibrant touch, while musk provides a warm and alluring base. This 8 Oz body spray envelops you in a cloud of sugary sweetness, leaving you feeling playful and irresistible.
China Glaze's Strong Adhesion Base Coat enhances the longevity of manicures by providing a strong foundation for China Glaze nail lacquers, ensuring a flawless and durable finish.

Nailtiques Nail Protein Formula #2 Plus Treatment effectively addresses severe nail issues such as peeling, softness, and deep split ridges. Its protein formula instantly bonds splitting or peeling nails, promoting strength and resilience. Regular use helps nails grow long, strong, and healthy. (1/4 oz)

Introducing Acquarella Remover, the revolutionary nail polish remover that combines safety, effectiveness, and environmental consciousness. Unlike conventional removers that rely on harsh solvents and oils, Acquarella's water-based formula gently removes polish without drying or damaging nails. Its biodegradable, plant-derived ingredients effectively dissolve stubborn residue, leaving nails pristine and ready for flawless application. Acquarella Remover is not only gentle on your nails but also on the environment, making it the perfect choice for conscious consumers.

Introducing COMB-A-COLOR, the revolutionary hair care tool that simplifies home hair coloring. Say goodbye to tedious parting and messy leaks! Simply pour your desired hair color into the squeeze bottle, attach the patented COMB-A-COLOR applicator, and comb away. Its innovative comb tips effortlessly part hair, ensuring even distribution and root coverage in just 5 minutes. Not limited to hair coloring, COMB-A-COLOR is also perfect for applying conditioning growth oils, medicated shampoos, and other liquid hair and scalp treatments. Transform your home hair care routine with COMB-A-COLOR, the ultimate solution for effortless and precise application.

Aubrey Organics' White Camellia Ultra-Smoothing Conditioner, a 11 oz liquid formula, is designed for dry, coarse, and unruly hair. Its emollient, anti-frizz formula tames unruly hair and replenishes moisture. Enriched with vitamins, it nourishes and protects against heat styling damage and breakage, restoring manageability for silky, shiny lengths or soft, controlled curls. Key ingredients include:* White Camellia Oil: Deep-conditions, smooths, and enhances shine
* Organic Aloe Vera: Replenishes moisture
* Wheat Germ Oil: Nourishes and protects

Tame Unruly Hair with Aubrey's Anti-Frizz Shampoo**This ultra-smoothing shampoo, enriched with proteins and emollients, tames unruly hair, leaving it manageable and frizz-free. Its deep-conditioning formula, featuring White Camellia and Sweet Almond Oils, nourishes and protects hair from heat damage and breakage. Soy Protein strengthens hair fibers, while Vegetable Glycerin enhances moisture retention. The result is silky, shiny lengths or soft, controlled curls, giving you the look you desire.

Aubrey Organics' Honeysuckle Rose Moisturizing Shampoo (11 oz) is a restorative formula designed for dry and brittle hair. Its blend of herbal emollients, including aloe, rice extract, and honeysuckle, rehydrates hair fibers, leaving them irresistibly soft and manageable. The shampoo's sweet fragrance adds an alluring touch, while its ingredients, such as Rosa Mosqueta seed oil, sweet almond oil, and ginseng root extract, nourish and protect hair. It is also suitable for bleached or highlighted hair.

eb5 Facial Cream, developed by Research Pharmacist Robert Heldfond, is a comprehensive skincare solution for individuals of all ages seeking to address the visible signs of aging. Formulated with a blend of Vitamins A, E, and B5, this cream effectively penetrates the skin to diminish the appearance of wrinkles, crow's feet, and uneven skin tone. Its lightweight, non-greasy base also soothes dry and sensitive skin, providing a rejuvenating effect. By combining the benefits of multiple creams into a single jar, eb5 Facial Cream offers a convenient and effective solution for achieving a youthful and radiant complexion.

Zoya Nail Polish boasts an extensive collection of over 300 fashion-forward shades suitable for all seasons and skin tones. Its innovative lacquer formula ensures exceptional durability, providing long-lasting wear. Zoya's commitment to health and safety is evident in its toluene- and formaldehyde-free formula, offering peace of mind to users. With four captivating new collections released annually, Zoya continuously expands its color palette, ensuring that there's a perfect shade for every style and occasion.

The Bass Wood Collection Brush features a large oval cushion with natural wood bristles and a solid wood handle. Its anti-static properties and heat resistance make it suitable for all hair types and blow-drying. However, it is important to keep the brush out of reach of children and consult a healthcare professional before use, as with all dietary supplements. Refer to the product label for additional information.

Glycolic acid treatment pads offer a comprehensive solution for youthful-looking skin. They gently exfoliate, removing wrinkles, large pores, and impurities. Enriched with witch hazel, these pads provide skin-toning and astringent benefits. Additionally, vitamins A, C, E, and Coenzyme Q10 nourish and protect the skin, leaving it smooth, clean, and radiant.

This weightless leave-in conditioner, enriched with certified organic botanicals, revitalizes damaged hair. Its cruelty-free formula restores strength, luster, and nourishment, while moisturizing and building body. The detangling properties ensure easy comb-out and styling. This conditioner penetrates each hair strand, repairing and plumping it for a thicker, more voluminous feel. Infused with proteins, it strengthens and conditions hair, leaving it healthy and manageable.

Burt's Bees Repair Serum harnesses the power of 11 natural botanicals to rejuvenate damaged skin. Green tea extract's antioxidants combat sun damage and pollution, while borage and evening primrose oils promote a healthy complexion. This 99.94% natural formula reduces fine lines and wrinkles, supporting skin renewal and restoration. Gently massage into skin to experience the transformative power of nature with Burt's Bees.

Skin Eternal Serum, an aqueous cosmetic serum, is a moisturizing lotion containing a blend of nutrients and plant extracts. It is easily absorbed into the skin, leaving it feeling softer and replenished. The serum is lightly scented with pure lavender and lemon oils. Contents are measured by volume.

Eucerin Plus Intensive Repair Foot Creme, dermatologist-recommended for dry skin, is clinically proven to heal cracked heels within two weeks. Its non-greasy formula combines alpha hydroxy to smooth skin and intense moisturizers like urea and glycerin. This fragrance-free creme provides fast relief and long-lasting moisturization, dramatically reducing skin cracks and rough heels. Note: Contains alpha hydroxy acid (AHA), which may increase sun sensitivity. Use sunscreen and protective clothing while using this product and for a week after.

Introduced in 1988, this feminine and romantic fragrance features a captivating blend of spice, flowers, and exotic fruits, complemented by earthy patchouli and warm amber. Designed for daytime wear, it is recommended to consider factors such as mood, stress levels, age, body chemistry, diet, and medications, as these can influence the scent's interaction with the skin. Additionally, skin type (dry or oily) can affect the fragrance's longevity.

Introducing the revolutionary hair styling product that defies categorization. Neither mousse nor gel, it's a transformative formula that empowers both straight and curly hair with unparalleled body, hold, and endless styling possibilities.

Biotin, a water-soluble vitamin, is essential for optimal growth and bodily functions. It serves as a crucial regulator in gluconeogenesis, fatty acid synthesis, and amino acid metabolism. Beyond its role in energy production, biotin facilitates protein synthesis. Moreover, it supports immune function and plays a vital role in maintaining healthy skin.

Introduced in 1919, this fragrance features exotic fruits and spices blended with soft mosses. Its recommended use is for evening wear. Note that various factors can influence a fragrance's scent on the skin, including mood, stress, age, body chemistry, diet, medications, and skin type.

Introduced in 1997, this fresh floral fragrance features honeysuckle, gardenia, and iris, complemented by amber and vanilla notes. Ideal for casual wear, it's important to note that factors such as mood, stress, age, body chemistry, diet, medications, and skin type can influence the scent's perception and longevity on the skin.

Introduced in 2005, it is important to consider various factors that can influence the natural scent of your skin and, consequently, the way a fragrance interacts with it. These factors include your mood, stress levels, age, body chemistry, diet, and current medications. Additionally, skin type, such as dry or oily skin, can affect the longevity of a fragrance after application.

Nail polish, with its vast array of over 200 shades, empowers women to transform their appearance and uplift their spirits. Each shade holds the potential to complement an outfit and enhance a woman's overall look and outlook.

This Japanese Invention Award-winning wash towel features a patented textured design. Its extra length and soft texture make it more sanitary and effective than loofah or washcloths. Product Dimensions: 28cm x 90cm (approximately 11 x 35 inches).

Introducing Short Sexy Hair Hard Up Gel, the ultimate styling solution for short hair enthusiasts. This extra firm hold gel effortlessly sculpts and defines your locks, ensuring a long-lasting, polished look. Its generous pump bottle provides ample product for multiple applications. Rest assured that this gel is cruelty-free and proudly made in the USA.

Aveda Pure Abundance Volumizing Shampoo enhances fine hair with its volumizing formula. Certified organic acacia gum from Chad and Africa nourishes hair, creating a fuller appearance and a thicker feel. Clinically tested and manufactured in the USA, this shampoo delivers noticeable volume and body for a more vibrant and voluminous hairstyle.

Ultra Sheer Dry-Touch Sunblock SPF 55 harnesses the power of Helioplex technology, a revolutionary breakthrough in UV protection. Helioplex provides exceptional UVA protection, effectively shielding skin from the damaging effects of these rays. The Dry-Touch formula absorbs excess oils, leaving a matte, non-greasy finish that feels light and comfortable on the skin. This dermatologist-tested sunblock offers superior protection without compromising on comfort, making it the ideal choice for those seeking effective and lightweight sun protection.

Blue Lizard Sensitive Sunscreen SPF 30+ (formerly Blue Lizard Sensitive Sunscream SPF 30) offers superior broad-spectrum protection against harmful UV rays with its advanced formula featuring micronized zinc oxide. Please note that due to a packaging update, the product received may differ from the image shown.

Patented and award-winning, this extra-long Japanese wash towel boasts a unique textured design. Its superior softness and hygiene surpass loofah, while its effectiveness exceeds that of a washcloth. Measuring approximately 11 x 35 inches (28cm x 90cm), this innovative towel elevates your bathing experience.

Enriched with European botanicals and hydrating humectants, this Nioxin Cleanser revitalizes and nourishes scalp and fine hair. Its potent blend of vitamins, proteins, and amino acids strengthens hair from the roots, alleviating dryness-induced tightness and tension. Eco-Correctives effectively eliminate pollutants and toxins, leaving the scalp and hair revitalized and healthier-looking.

The Bionutrient Protectives Cleanser, infused with European botanicals and humectants, revitalizes and hydrates the scalp and fine hair. Its nutrient-rich formula, containing vitamins, proteins, and amino acids, nourishes the scalp, promoting stronger hair growth. By alleviating dryness-induced tightness and tension, this cleanser restores scalp health. Additionally, Eco-Correctives effectively remove pollutants and toxins, leaving the scalp and hair looking fuller and healthier.

Harnessing the ancient healing powers of the Dead Sea, our All Natural Black Mud Soap rejuvenates your skin. Infused with a unique blend of Dead Sea minerals, this soap gently cleanses, removing impurities while replenishing essential minerals. The centuries-old Dead Sea mud nourishes and hydrates, leaving your skin feeling refreshed and revitalized. As the popularity of Dead Sea black mud's therapeutic and beautifying properties grows, this soap has emerged as a sought-after choice for those seeking radiant and healthy skin.

Introducing Eye Bright, the revolutionary pink pencil that transforms tired eyes into a radiant, youthful glow. Its creamy texture and perfect brightening hue effortlessly conceals and illuminates the shadows around the eyes, while subtly lifting the outer corners. The result is an instantly wide-awake, refreshed appearance that will make you feel as vibrant as you look.

Australian Gold Moisture Lock extends the life of your tan while nourishing your skin with essential ingredients. Its luxurious formula leaves your skin feeling velvety soft and smooth after every application.

Introducing the revolutionary nail foundation that transforms ridged and discolored nails into a flawless canvas. Its unique formula smooths out imperfections, leaving a translucent finish that provides the perfect base for any manicure.

Revlon ColorSilk #48 Burgundy is an ammonia-free hair color that nourishes and protects hair. Its gentle formula penetrates each strand, leaving hair silkier, shinier, and healthier-looking. The after-color conditioner, enriched with silk proteins, provides deep conditioning and 100% gray coverage. With a convenient 2 Fl Oz size, Revlon ColorSilk #48 Burgundy offers a vibrant and long-lasting color experience.

Unlock the secret to your healthiest hair with Pantene, the world's leading hair care brand since 1945. Our unwavering commitment to healthy, radiant hair empowers you with tailored solutions for your unique hair needs. From nourishing shampoos to transformative conditioners, Pantene offers a comprehensive range of products designed to restore your hair's vitality and unleash its natural shine. Discover the Pantene that's perfect for you and experience the transformative power of healthy, flawless, and oh-so-shiny hair.

Discovered in an antique New England cookbook, the formula for this exceptional bar shampoo has been the foundation of our renowned line for decades. Its 100% vegetable oil composition ensures a rich lather, effective cleansing, and effortless rinsing, leaving hair healthy, lustrous, and clean. Unlike detergent-based shampoos, it preserves natural oils, eliminating the need for conditioner for most users. Its fresh, clean scent adds to its allure.

Super Sunnies Eyeshields provide optimal protection for indoor tanning. Featuring a flexible high-rise nosebridge that prevents tan lines and an adjustable elastic headband for a secure fit, these sunnies ensure maximum comfort and coverage. While available in four vibrant colors, due to limited supply, customers will receive a randomly selected color upon purchase.

gloLoose Base is a silky, luminescent mineral powder that provides a matte finish with excellent coverage. Infused with antioxidants and UV protection, this ultra-fine powder blends seamlessly into the skin, concealing blemishes, scarring, hyperpigmentation, and other skin concerns. Its creamy texture ensures a flawless, natural-looking complexion.

Indulge in DevaConcepts' Hair Styling Haven: DevaCurl Mist-er Right Lavender Curl Revitalizer. This 12 oz. elixir revives your curls, restoring their bounce and definition. Simply spray from 10 inches away, evenly misting your curls. Then, scrunch towards your scalp in an upward motion. This revitalizing mist awakens and reactivates any Deva styler previously applied, leaving your curls refreshed and radiant.

Vitamin E Face Mist is a refreshing and protective skincare solution. Infused with a delicate rosewater scent, it instantly hydrates and refreshes the skin. Its versatility extends to setting makeup, ensuring a flawless finish. For optimal hydration, spray onto the face once or twice and allow it to dry. It's an ideal travel companion, especially during flights, protecting the skin from dry cabin air and climate changes. For an extra cooling effect, store the mist in the refrigerator during summer. Experience the benefits of healthy-looking, hydrated skin with Vitamin E Face Mist.

Maintain impeccable hygiene for your skincare routine. Blendercleanser, from Silva and Lorenz, is the ideal companion for your Beautyblender, effectively removing oil and dirt that accumulate during use. Its gentle, lavender-scented formula, free from dyes and irritants, ensures a soothing and hygienic cleanse. The soy-based formula breaks down rapidly, leaving no residue, while the natural moisturizing properties of soy and antimicrobial qualities of lavender promote skin health. Regular use of Blendercleanser ensures a clean and refreshed Beautyblender, contributing to a healthy and radiant complexion.

Pur Minerals' 4-in-1 Pressed Mineral Makeup SPF 15 seamlessly blends concealer, powder, foundation, and sun protection for a flawless complexion. Enriched with vitamin E, it nourishes and hydrates for healthy skin and extended wear. Silica absorbs excess oil, while organic shea butter conditions to soften and smooth, resulting in a natural-looking finish with a silky touch. Blush Medium is tailored for medium skin tones with pink undertones.

Introducing Beautyblender, the revolutionary makeup applicator designed by Hollywood makeup artists. Its unique teardrop shape and ultra-soft texture provide effortless application, reaching even the most challenging areas. Washable, reusable, and recyclable, Beautyblender is eco-friendly and hygienic. Its latex-free and antimicrobial properties ensure skin safety. Use it damp or dry for flawless application of liquid, cream, mineral, and powder makeup. The included Blendercleanser, a lavender-scented, soy-based formula, effectively removes makeup residue and maintains hygiene. With its versatility and commitment to cleanliness, Beautyblender empowers you to achieve a flawless makeup look every time.

Experience a flawless, shine-free complexion with our Combination/Oily Skin Foundation. Its SPF 6 protection shields your skin from harmful UV rays, while its SoftFlex formula ensures all-day comfort. The oil-free formula effectively controls shine, leaving you with a natural, transfer-resistant finish that lasts all day. Made in the U.S.A., this foundation provides a fresh, radiant look that will keep you feeling confident and beautiful.

Nubian Heritage Coconut & Papaya Bar Soap, a 5 oz. (141 g) skin brightening soap infused with vanilla beans, is a sweet-scented and nutrient-rich homage to tropical ingredients. Coconut Oil, rich in vitamins, minerals, and fatty acids, softens and protects the skin, while Papaya Enzymes gently exfoliate, stimulate circulation, and firm the skin. Shea Butter and Comfrey Root extract promote healing, making this soap suitable for all skin types. Its tropical aroma brings balance to the body, physically, emotionally, and spiritually, as Nubian Heritage believes that balance is the root of all healing.

Indulge in a gentle exfoliating experience with this mild body scrub. Its blend of natural sea salts and micro-sloughing beads gently removes impurities, leaving your skin smooth and polished. This exfoliator effectively retexturizes and balances the skin, eliminating excess grime, dirt, and oils, revealing a refreshed and revitalized complexion.

Unleash your styling prowess with Garnier Fructis Style! Infused with fruit micro-waxes, our products empower you to craft and command any hairstyle you desire, granting you ultimate control over your style destiny.

Introducing the Professional Stainless Steel Ingrown Toenail File and Cleaner. This innovative tool alleviates the discomfort of ingrown nails by gently filing away excess growth. Its thin, curved end effortlessly cleans beneath and around the nail, ensuring optimal hygiene and preventing further discomfort.

Introducing RevitaLift Double Lifting Gel, the revolutionary dual-action treatment that instantly transforms your skin. Its unique formula combines an ultra-concentrated lifting gel with a potent anti-wrinkle cream, delivering an unparalleled lifting and wrinkle-fighting experience. The gel, enriched with Pro-Tensium, instantly tightens skin, reducing the appearance of pores and smoothing texture. Clinical studies reveal that 62% of users experienced immediate skin tightening. The anti-wrinkle cream, infused with Pro-Retinol A, penetrates deeply to combat wrinkles and neck creases. In just four weeks, wrinkles are visibly diminished, and 81% of users report lifted and tightened facial skin. Experience the transformative power of RevitaLift Double Lifting Gel and witness the remarkable rejuvenation of your skin.

Introducing "Princesses Rule," a captivating sheer baby pink polish adorned with shimmering glitter. This versatile shade seamlessly complements any nail polish collection. Apply a single coat for a delicate, feminine touch or layer it over other polishes for a dazzling pink finish. Its soft, ethereal sparkle flatters all skin tones, making it a must-have for any princess-inspired manicure. Part of the enchanting OPI Princesses Charming Collection, this polish is sure to add a touch of magic to your fingertips.

Introducing Kiss Me, the revolutionary liquid eyeliner that transforms your eyes with its water-resistant formula. Unlike traditional eyeliners, Kiss Me's unique composition creates an impervious layer of color that defies fading, smudging, and flaking. Whether you're shedding tears or rubbing your eyes, Kiss Me remains intact, ensuring a flawless and long-lasting look. Crafted in Japan, this innovative eyeliner empowers you to create captivating eye contours with confidence.

LAVANILA's Healthy Fragrance nourishes the spirit and envelops the senses with premium essential oils harmonized with Madagascar vanilla. Each natural scent is meticulously infused with antioxidant-rich goji berry and kakadu plum, providing 30 essential vitamins and minerals for enhanced well-being. The invigorating, pure scents are free from potentially harmful ingredients. Pure Vanilla captivates with a sensual fusion of vanilla, tonka bean, and heliotrope.

Embrace the allure of this contemporary light pink shade, designed to flatter all skin tones. With a single application, achieve a delicate blush, or layer multiple coats to intensify its subtle charm.

Ceramides, naturally present in the skin's outermost layer, play a crucial role in moisture retention. Depletion of ceramides impairs the skin's ability to retain moisture. Unlike conventional lotions that merely hydrate the skin's surface, Curél moisturizers target the root cause of dryness by replenishing ceramide levels. This approach not only alleviates symptoms but also prevents their recurrence over time, promoting long-term skin health.

Introducing Olay Ultra Moisture In-Shower Body Lotion, the revolutionary way to hydrate your skin in the shower! Designed for extra dry and dry skin types, this innovative lotion harnesses the power of moisturizers that penetrate deeply and lock into your skin. Its unique formula works in harmony with the humidity of your shower, infusing your skin with moisture at the optimal moment. Say goodbye to dry, flaky, dull, rough, and itchy skin and embrace the transformative power of Olay Ultra Moisture In-Shower Body Lotion.

Unleash your inner stylist with Paul Mitchell Smoothing Super Skinny Serum. This revolutionary formula transforms unruly hair into a sleek, frizz-free masterpiece. Its deep-penetrating action displaces water and constricts the hair shaft, leaving you with a smooth, manageable mane in record time. Say goodbye to endless styling and hello to a life filled with effortless beauty.

This hydrating formula transcends mere cleansing by preserving skin's moisture, unveiling a smoother, more radiant complexion. Pro-vitamin B5 and Vitamins A&E, encapsulated in antioxidant microbeads, nourish and safeguard against damage and aging. Soy and Active Oxygen amplify the formula's efficacy. It leaves skin pristine and at the optimal pH level, maximizing the benefits of all Alpha Hydrox anti-wrinkle treatments.

Introducing the classic collection's revolutionary formula that glides effortlessly, ensuring an even, streak-free application. Its advanced technology delivers a smooth, flawless finish in a convenient 0.5 FL oz - 15 ML size.

K-Pak Intense Hydrating Treatment is an intensive moisture treatment specifically designed for severely dry, damaged, chemically treated, or frizzy hair. It effectively restores moisture to dehydrated hair, leaving it revitalized and manageable.

Schwarzkopf's BC Bonacure Color Save Silver Shampoo, an 8.5-ounce unisex shampoo, is designed for normal hair. This shampoo is part of the BC Bonacure Color Save line, created by the Schwarzkopf design house.

Escape the scorching sun and achieve a radiant tan with Maui Babe Browning Lotion. This revolutionary formula, crafted from a secret family recipe, harnesses the power of natural Hawaiian ingredients to accelerate your tanning process. Determining Expiration Date from Lot Code:**Lot codes, typically 6-7 digits long and beginning with 0, 1, 2, or 3, provide information about a product's manufacturing date. The first three digits represent the Julian Date (day of the year), followed by two digits for the year, and two digits for an internal batch number. For instance, lot code 0400901 indicates a product manufactured on February 9, 2009 (Julian Date 040), from Batch Number 01.
